title: Duck WC Active 3in1 Toilet Liquid Rimblock Cool Mist 55ml, Pack of 6
description: Product Description Hygiene in the home is an essential part of everyday life, particularly when it comes to the toilet. Duck Liquid Rimblock Toilet Cleaner consistently cleans, freshens and ﬁghts limescale with its unique action, Duck Liquid Rimblock Toilet Cleaner helps keeping your toilet fresh and clean with every flush, leaving behind a long lasting fragrance. Uses: Suitable for toilet bowls Ingredients Contains 5-15% Non-Ionic Surfactants, 15-30% Anionic Surfactants, Also contains Perfume, 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1,3-Diol, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hydroxyisohexyl 3-Cyclohexene Carboxaldehyde, Linalool, Coumarin Directions Directions for use: 1. Hold over toilet bowl, press liquid bottle into cage, ensuring the bottle cap is fully pierced. 2. Fix the cage onto the rim of the toilet making sure the platform is in flow of water. 3. Wash hands after use. 4. When empty, remove the bottle and replace it with Duck Liquid Rimblock Refill. Manufacturer Contact Information SCJ Ltd. Camberley GU16 7AJ See more
